title: bihai purpurea
intro: Bihai purpurea, also known as the Purple Perilla or Shiso plant, is a type of herb that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The leaves and seeds of this plant have been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bihai purpurea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight loss, as well as its potential in treating various conditions such as arthritis and high blood pressure. Bihai purpurea can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
